Play Cory Frank's 🎸

We host live bands every Friday and Saturday night. We want to hear from you.

Send an Inquiry Call (816) 214-5256

Weekend Energy

Friday and Saturday crowds ready to sing along.

Sound & Stage

A strong live setup built for a real show.

Paid Gigs

Recurring opportunities for bands that bring the heat.

Why Play Here

Cory Frank's brings the kind of crowd that makes a live set feel like an event, not background noise.

🎵 Packed weekend crowds

Friday and Saturday nights draw people who are already there for music, drinks, and a good time.

🍺 Enthusiastic music-loving audience

Our guests show up ready to listen, dance, and stay engaged from the first song to the last encore.

📍 Prime Kansas City location

We sit in a highly accessible spot that helps bring in strong local traffic and repeat visitors.

🎤 Great sound system and stage setup

We’re set up for bands that care about the full performance experience, not just volume.

💰 Paid performance opportunities

We value the work that goes into a great live show and offer paid bookings for the right acts.

📅 Recurring weekly bookings available

Bands that connect with our crowd may have the chance to come back again and again.

What We Look For

We book original acts, cover bands, and everything in between. We love high-energy performers who can keep a crowd on their feet. Genre-open: rock, country, blues, funk, pop covers — if you're good and you can entertain a bar crowd, we want you.

Original Acts Cover Bands High Energy Crowd Engagement

Our vibe

  • • Rock & roll attitude without the ego.
  • • A room that rewards performers who bring the crowd in.
  • • Ideal for bands who know how to keep the night moving.
  • • Built for repeat bookings when the chemistry is right.

Band Inquiries

Tell us who you are, what you sound like, and when you're available. If your act is a fit, we'll be in touch.

Fields marked with * are required.

Prefer to Reach Out Directly?

Call us and let's talk music, dates, and the kind of night you want to bring to Cory Frank's Bar & Grill.

Call Us: (816) 214-5256
